triaged_components.name: bean_hoppers
triaged_components.reasoning: Primarily represents inventory/capacity with no meaningful internal dynamics. Main function is storage with degradation only affecting bean quality over time.

candidate_events.description: Bean hopper left/rear missing during process

candidate_events.name: hopper_missing_right
candidate_events.description: Bean hopper right/front missing during process

triaged_components.name: ceramic_grinders
triaged_components.reasoning: Has clear degradation mechanisms (burr wear), meaningful internal dynamics affecting coffee quality, and multiple fault conditions that impact machine performance.

candidate_events.name: grinder_blocked
candidate_events.description: The grinder may be blocked or damaged

triaged_components.name: brewing_chamber

candidate_events.name: bean_hopper_empty_locked

triaged_components.reasoning: Primary user interface with degradation mechanisms (surface contamination), multiple observable outputs for state estimation, and fault conditions.

outputs.typical_value: espresso, cappuccino, latte, americano, hot water, etc.

candidate_states.name: surface_cleanliness
candidate_states.description: Screen surface cleanliness degrading with use

candidate_events.name: action_required_indicator

triaged_components.name: grounds_drawer
triaged_components.reasoning: Primarily represents capacity/fill level with simple accumulation dynamics. No complex internal processes or meaningful degradation affecting machine performance.

candidate_states.description: Current amount of coffee grounds in drawer

candidate_events.name: drawer_full
candidate_events.description: grounds drawer is full with coffee cakes

triaged_components.reasoning: Critical hydraulic component supplying water to both boilers, with clear fault conditions affecting water flow and machine operation.

triaged_components.name: drip_tray
triaged_components.reasoning: Passive collection component with no meaningful internal dynamics, degradation mechanisms, or fault conditions. Primarily represents liquid accumulation.

candidate_states.name: liquid_level
candidate_states.description: Current liquid level in drip tray

triaged_components.name: cleaning_system
triaged_components.reasoning: Critical system with clear degradation mechanisms affecting coffee quality and food safety, complex cleaning cycles, and fault conditions that can lock out machine operation.

candidate_states.name: system_cleanliness
candidate_states.description: Overall system cleanliness degrading without regular cleaning

candidate_states.name: hygiene_safety
candidate_states.description: Food hygiene safety level degrading with improper cleaning

candidate_events.name: cleaning_required_lockout
candidate_events.description: Machine prevents drink preparation when cleaning is required

simple_states.name: drip_tray_level
simple_states.description: Current liquid level in drip tray

modeling_notes: Bean hoppers classified as simple_state due to primarily inventory function despite having fault conditions
Grounds drawer and drip tray are passive collection components with minimal dynamics
All boilers and pumps are critical full_components due to thermal/pressure dynamics and degradation
Touch screen included as full_component due to observable outputs needed for state estimation
Cleaning system is critical for overall machine health and has complex operational cycles
Flow paths establish clear physical connections between components for composite model wiring
